about.bio: Game developer specializing in Unity, Godot and pixel art. Passionate about creating immersive experiences, retro-style games, and interactive storytelling.

skills.name: Unity
skills.description: 2D and 3D gameplay systems, physics, UI, and multiplayer

skills.name: Godot
skills.description: GDScript and C# game development, 2D platformers

skills.name: Game Design
skills.description: Level design, mechanics design, balancing, and playtesting

skills.name: C#
skills.description: Game scripting, tools, and editor extensions

projects.name: Sky Racer
projects.description: A thrilling game where you navigate a car through 3D space with narrow roads. Tap to change direction as the road shifts — a test of quick reflexes and precise timing!

projects.name: Fast Ball
projects.description: A minimalistic hypercasual game where the score increases as you touch platforms and you die if you collide with enemies. Features main menu, scene management, and audio options.

projects.name: TheFishMaster
projects.description: A fishing game where the hook is cast for a certain length and catches fishes as it comes back. Features dragging mechanics, fish spawning at different water levels, and idle earning.

projects.name: Collect It!
projects.description: Collect blobs to refill your energy bar before it depletes! Features touch-to-move, random blob spawning, and player bounce mechanics.

projects.name: Shinobi Runner
projects.description: A Naruto fan game with split-screen gameplay. Two characters dodge kunai knives — tap each side of the screen to dodge. If one dies, game over!

projects.name: Shoot It!
projects.description: A basketball game where you drag and shoot the ball into the post. Miss 3 shots and you're out! Features basketball physics, lives system, and 2D vector art.

projects.name: Donkey Kong Clone
projects.description: A recreation of the classic Donkey Kong game from Gameboy times! Features vertical climbing, barrel physics, level progression, pixel art, and animations.

projects.name: Hotshot
projects.description: A game made for Polymars x ScoreSpace Game Jam in 3 days. Built with a team of 4 across timezones. Features a leaderboard system and was submitted with just 10 minutes left!

projects.name: Squishy Sophie
projects.description: A puzzle platformer for GMTK Jam 2024. Play as Sophie the cat on a mission to reach the milk! Dodge dogs, eat fish to grow, avoid yarn balls. Theme: 'Built to Scale'.

projects.name: Crashed Ship
projects.description: A space exploration game for the Mini Jam (4 days). Theme: 'Earth' with 'no green' constraint. Find scattered spaceship parts and repair your ship to return home!

projects.name: Joe the Scammer
projects.description: A quirky game about a shark running a 'fishy' pawn shop, overpricing junk to sea creatures. Made for IndieDevGameJam5. Secured 7th place!

projects.name: Bubble Chef
projects.description: Global Game Jam 2025 entry. Play as a bubble-shaped chef catching ingredients to create Indian dishes like vada pav and pani puri! 3D visuals with chaotic cooking action.

projects.name: Redacted Skies
projects.description: A retro-inspired adventure about survival, speed, and determination. 3-day jam with 200+ entries. Placed 41st overall and 16th for best theme use!

projects.name: Knight Spade
projects.description: A card-based game for the Love Game Jam. Pick a card to get a random power-up and defeat the boss! 12th in graphics, 41st overall out of 400+ entries.

projects.name: Glitch in the Grid
projects.description: A fast-paced bullet-hell shooter for BulletHellJam. Grid-based combat with unique power-ups, dynamic enemy waves, and healing orbs. 30th out of 300+ entries!

projects.name: Amnesia
projects.description: A 3D horror game for a week-long jam. Wake up in an unfamiliar house, find clues, identify the impostor among faceless silhouettes. 90th out of 500+ entries!

projects.name: Deep Bound
projects.description: Made for GMTK Game Jam. An underwater survival game where dying doesn't end the run — it changes you. Built in 1.5 days, submitted 3 minutes before deadline!

projects.name: Stardew Valley Clone
projects.description: A farming-based game inspired by Stardew Valley, built while learning Godot. Exploring farming mechanics, character interactions, and charming world-building.

projects.name: Making a Game in Every Language
projects.description: Building a playable game in every popular programming language — Python, C#, C++, Java, JS, TS, Lua, Rust, Go, Dart, Kotlin, Swift, Ruby and more!

blogs.title: Game Design with Game Programming Patterns
blogs.description: A deep dive into Game Programming Patterns by Robert Nystrom — covering Command, Observer, State, Component, Game Loop, and Flyweight patterns for building robust game systems.

blogs.title: Making a Game in Every Language — Day 1
blogs.description: Launching my dream project: building a playable game in every popular programming language. Day 1: Space Shooter in Python with Pygame!

achievements.title: 12th in Graphics — Love Game Jam (Knight Spade)
30th out of 300+ — BulletHellJam (Glitch in the Grid)

alchemist: Welcome, adventurer! I'm the Skill Alchemist.
Each crystal here represents a skill Saurabh has mastered.
Press E near the crystals to learn more!
miner: Yo! I guard the Project Mines.
Every chest contains a project Saurabh has built.
Some are game jam entries, some are passion projects!
shaman: Greetings, young one. I keep the Hall of Achievements.
Each statue tells the story of a milestone.
Saurabh's journey has been quite remarkable.
villageLady: He's a game developer from Mumbai.
Check out the terminal at the end to get in touch!
